devSite.heroName: Rules in your language. Decisions you can trust.
devSite.heroText: Write policies, workflows and decisions in plain English, 中文, Deutsch or हिन्दी — run them on a deterministic, auditable engine where every decision is replayable.
devSite.heroCodeHint: Real Aster source — run it in the Playground.
devSite.valueLanguageBody: Write rules in the natural language your team already speaks. No DSL ceremony, no operator soup — the source reads like the policy it encodes.
devSite.valueDeterministicBody: Two independent runtimes, one intermediate representation, byte-identical results. The same rule never disagrees with itself.
devSite.valueAuditableBody: Every decision carries a trace you can replay — which rule fired, on which inputs, to which result. Nothing hidden, nothing inferred.
devSite.businessExpertBody: Compliance officer, risk analyst, or policy author. You want rules in your language, with AI helping you write the first draft.
devSite.developerBody: You want a deterministic, auditable rules engine you can embed — two runtimes, one IR, every decision replayable.

playground.title: Playground
playground.subtitle: Write a rule, run it, replay the decision.
playground.traceHint: Which rule fired, on which inputs, to which result.
